scripts.codegen: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path').resolve(__dirname,'../../lib/api-zod/src/index.ts');let c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');c=c.replace(/export \\* from '\\.\\/.*/g,s=>s.includes('api.schemas')?'':s).replace(/export \\* from \"\\.\\/.*/g,s=>s.includes('api.schemas')?'':s);fs.writeFileSync(p,c.trim()+'\n');" && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
